macro_banner: ⚠ NFP Jun 5 (85K) · Unemp Jun 5 (4.3%) · CPI MoM Jun 10 (+0.5%) · Core CPI Jun 10 (+0.3%) · PPI MoM Jun 11 (+0.8%)

commentary.overnight: <cite index="3-1">S&P 500 futures are down 0.5% at 7:51 a.m. ET as the AI trade continues to falter.</cite> <cite index="9-8,9-9">Bitcoin fell 5% to $60,450, hitting its lowest level since October 2024 at $59,764.90</cite>, with the <cite index="9-5">cryptocurrency on pace for a 17% weekly loss amid a record 13-day streak of ETF outflows.</cite> <cite index="4-10">The 10-year Treasury yield jumped to 4.54%</cite> after NFP data.
commentary.positions: Your crypto miners and quantum plays took a bloodbath. BTBT (-13.2%), GLXY (-14.2%), HIVE (-16.0%), IREN (-16.0%), MARA (-13.7%), and RIOT (-11.1%) all crashed in tandem with Bitcoin's slide below $60,500. <cite index="23-1,23-2">Riot tumbled 11.4%, MARA slid 12.2% as bitcoin fell 3.3% to $61,311.</cite> Quantum stocks IONQ (-13.5%), QBTS (-14.7%), QUBT (-11.1%), and RGTI (-15.5%) also hammered. Oracle (-10.3%) and SMCI (-11.5%) led tech losses. COPP is now -0.6% from your stop loss. HIMS, IONQ, IREN, MARA, MOH, RIOT, and SMCI are all within 8% of their stop losses.
commentary.earnings: <cite index="4-27">Oracle reports June 10 with EPS estimated at $1.96.</cite> <cite index="4-3,4-7">IOT beat EPS by 30.6% with actual $0.17 vs estimate $0.1302 on June 4,</cite> though stock is only down 1.3%. HIVE missed badly on June 2 with actual -$0.28 vs estimate -$0.21, yet the stock is still up 38.5% in your portfolio despite yesterday's -16% drop.
commentary.macro: <cite index="28-6">The US economy added 172K jobs in May, well above forecasts of 85K,</cite> with <cite index="28-2">unemployment remaining unchanged at 4.3%.</cite> <cite index="4-9,4-10">Stocks reacted poorly in a 'good news is bad news' scenario as the 10-year note yield jumped to 4.54%, fueled by concerns the Fed might have to tame a hot economy.</cite> <cite index="4-27">CPI (est 0.5% MoM, 4.2% YoY) and Core CPI (est 0.3% MoM, 2.9% YoY) hit June 10,</cite> which could further pressure risk assets if hot.
